chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 5542 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 23109/25. (stay) 3. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2026 None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Kalash A. Vaswani, AAG. ---------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order sheet reflects that even on the last date, counsel for the Petitioner was not in attendance, all of which suggests that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter, which stands dismissed accordingly alongwith listed application. Judge Judge Ayaz
